final_prompt.prompt:
Create a product shot of tactical military gear including firearms, ballistic vests, and night vision devices arranged in a clean layout.

Style/medium: photorealistic product photography, military catalog aesthetic, hard surface rendering
Composition: flat-lay overhead arrangement, symmetrical grid layout, items evenly spaced with precision spacing
Subject: tactical firearms, ballistic plate carriers, night vision goggles, tactical pouches and accessories
Scene/backdrop: solid dark matte surface, no environmental context, pure studio backdrop
Lighting/mood: cold directional key light from upper left, hard shadows, minimal fill, serious and authoritative atmosphere
Color palette: muted dark grays and blacks as base, cold blue-white highlights, subtle olive drab accents
Materials/textures: matte polymer firearm surfaces, Cordura fabric weave on vests, rubberized NVG housing, metallic magazine finishes
Avoid: warm tones, soft diffused lighting, cluttered composition, cartoonish rendering, 8K stuffer text
